title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Refractionist
shortInfo: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited Recruitment 2026: 1 Refractionist vacancy announced. Apply offline before 10 June 2026. Candidates with SSLC / PUC and Diploma in Ophthalmic Assistant Course can apply for this part-time opportunity.

basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited Recruitment 2026: 1 Refractionist vacancy announced. Apply offline before 10 June 2026. Candidates with SSLC / PUC and Diploma in Ophthalmic Assistant Course can apply for this part-time opportunity.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years as on 01 May 2026. Age relaxation will be as per company rules.

qualification.education_qualification: SSLC / PUC with Diploma in Ophthalmic Assistant Course
qualification.details: SSLC / PUC with Diploma in Ophthalmic Assistant Course

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the HAL Refractionist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the HAL Refractionist (PART TIME/VISIT BASIS) post is 10 June 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed SSLC / PUC with a Diploma in Ophthalmic Assistant Course to be eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Refractionist post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Refractionist (PART TIME/VISIT BASIS) post is 40 years as of 01 May 2026.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Refractionist post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Refractionist (PART TIME/VISIT BASIS) post.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this HAL job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: What is the job type for the Refractionist position?
faq.answer: The job type is Part Time/Visit Basis.

faq.question: Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) is conducting this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is IHC/HR/25/15/2026.

faq.question: Where is the HAL office located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The HAL office is located in Bangalore, Karnataka, with the pincode 560017.

seo_tags: Hindustan Aeronautics REFRACTIONIST (PART TIME/VISIT BASIS) Recruitment 2026
